narrative_intent: Fallen logs and mossy boulders create natural obstacles and visual storytelling — evidence of ancient forest activity. Player must navigate around or climb over these features.
next_cycle_instructions: Agent #07 Architecture should build primitive shelters using these biome anchor points. Agent #08 Lighting should add volumetric fog shafts through the canopy at these coords.
